news.paragraph: The recent headlines paint a picture of resilient consumer spending, with luxury retailers exceeding expectations and airline travel remaining strong despite rising fares. Additionally, significant developments in the utility sector, particularly those powering AI data centers, and strong performance in AI-related stocks like Broadcom suggest a robust market environment. While EWY is an ETF and not directly tied to these specific headlines, the underlying economic strength and sector trends could influence its performance.

headlines.title: Luxury Retailers' Earnings Top Views As Affluent Consumers Keep Splurging
Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
Airline Fares Are Up, But Americans Still Plan To Fly
Deal Creates One Of World's Largest Utilities, Major Power Provider For AI Data Centers
Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
The Surprising Consumer Trend That Credit Cards Show
